case_title: GENEVE, RUSSELL VS CAMOZZI, TERESA DBA THE CAMOZZI ART STUDIO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY GENEVE, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT CAMOZZI, TERESA DBA THE CAMOZZI ART STUDIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAMOZZI, TERESA DBA THE CAMOZZI ART STUDIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GENEVE, RUSSELL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CAMOZZI, TERESA DBA THE CAMOZZI ART STUDIO PLAINTIFF HAS NO CONTRACTING LICENSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CAMOZZI, TERESA DBA THE CAMOZZI ART STUDIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GENEVE, RUSSELL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
